reason: Wave 2.1a bound every engine family (reducer, comparator, navigation, completion) to an entry point and drained this list; it stays empty. A non-foreign family reappears here only if its engine binding is intentionally removed, which the per-family guard in src/vectors.test.ts then flags.

foreign.reason: A foreign family's consumer is never packages/engine (PROTOCOL.md §13). client-store's consumer is apps/web's store (Wave 2.1d) and the iOS store (Phase I1b, apps/ios/Tests/CrossyStoreTests); clue-runs' consumer is the clue-run parser and renderer in apps/web and iOS. The engine runner discovers and shape-validates these vectors but never executes them; execution lives in the consumer suites. Unlike `families`, a foreign family is never bound to the engine and never leaves this list, so the Wave 2.1a per-family rebind that drains `families` must not touch it.
